name: Taco Soup
recipeIngredient: 15 oz dark red kidney beans (canned, drained, chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a three-quart saucepan, cook the chicken, onions, and bell peppers over medium heat until the chicken is no longer pink and the vegetables are tender.
2. Stir in the taco seasoning mix, water, stewed tomatoes, tomato sauce, kidney beans, pinto beans, and salsa.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low.
4. Simmer for 30 minutes, or until the flavors are well blended.
